name: Strategy Execution Framework
purpose: Convert strategic choices into staged initiatives, evidence gates, owners, dependencies, and review cycles.
questionsToAsk: What should happen before any large commitment?
Which capabilities are required for the target operating model?
Which KPI or pivot trigger should be reviewed weekly?
scoringModel: Score dependency clarity, owner clarity, evidence requirements, cost visibility, risk visibility, KPI linkage, and review cadence.
Prioritize validation, compliance, and cash-protection initiatives before expansion work.
Reduce confidence when an initiative has no completion evidence.
Require pivot triggers for major assumptions.
qualityChecks: Complete strategy formulation before generating a launch roadmap.
Assess impact on time, capital, operations, licensing, staffing, supply chain, technology, marketing, sales, accounting, insurance, compliance, and customer experience.
Map initiatives into today, this week, 30 days, 60 days, 90 days, 6 months, and 12 months.
Create weekly, monthly, and quarterly feedback loops.
warnings: Do not launch expensive initiatives before validation and compliance gates.
